title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Apollo Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Apollo Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!
